Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class ChannelObjectLinkingRule

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.Metadata
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.ChannelObjectLinkingRule
public class ChannelObjectLinkingRule extends Metadata

Java class for ChannelObjectLinkingRule complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="ChannelObjectLinkingRule">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}Metadata">
       <sequence>
         <element name="actionForNoRecordFound" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}ActionForNoRecordFound"/>
         <element name="actionForSingleRecordFound" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}ActionForSingleRecordFound"/>
         <element name="channelType" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}ChannelType"/>
         <element name="description" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isLinkedRecordOpenedAsSubTab" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="isRuleActive" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="masterLabel" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="objectToLink" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}ObjectToLink"/>
         <element name="ruleName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
